div.style: font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; background: transparent; color: #ffffff; padding: 0.5rem 0 2rem; max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto;
display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; margin:2rem 0; color:rgba(255,75,75,0.4); font-size:10px; font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; letter-spacing:3px;

span.style: flex:1; height:1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,75,75,0.3), transparent); display:block;
flex:1; height:1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,75,75,0.3), transparent); display:block;
